title: CHA DC423 :: Site Refresh — New Look, Same Terminal
author: tothehilt
content: >> Site Update Log
Pushed a refresh to noogahackers.com today. New visuals, new commands, same hacker energy.
[01] New Chattanooga Background
•	Cyberpunk-styled Chattanooga skyline featuring the Tennessee Aquarium, Walnut Street Bridge, and Lookout Mountain.
•	Green hacker glow and binary code rain in the sky.
•	Lightened the overlay so you can actually see the landmarks behind the terminal.
[02] Draggable & Resizable Terminal
•	The terminal window can now be dragged around the screen by clicking the title bar.
•	Resize it from the bottom-right corner drag handle.
•	Stays within viewport bounds, re-centers on browser resize.
[03] CRT Scanline Overlay
•	Subtle horizontal scanline effect across the entire page for that retro CRT monitor feel.
•	Pure CSS, zero performance hit, pointer-events pass through.
[04] New Terminal Commands
•	help / ? — Lists all available commands so new visitors know what to type.
•	clear — Wipes the terminal screen.
•	uptime — Shows how long the node has been running (since 2012).
•	date — Current date and time.
•	sudo lights on — Flips to light mode. White terminal, bright background. Cursed.
•	sudo lights off — Returns to the dark side where you belong.
[05] Meeting Countdown Timer
•	The MOTD box now shows a countdown to the next meeting (last Wednesday of each month @ 18:30).
•	Shows 'TODAY' or 'TOMORROW' when it's close.
[06] Under the Hood
•	No frameworks. No dependencies. Just raw HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS.
•	All changes in a single index.html file. View source encouraged.
>> Contributing
•	Pull requests welcome — github.com/dc423
•	Ideas for new terminal commands, easter eggs, or features? Bring them to the next meeting or submit a PR.
•	Hack responsibly. Stay curious.
EOF
